title: Raghwinder Singh Siddhu - 467250
text:
Raghwinder Singh 
 Siddhu
 

 
 Solicitor
 
 

 
 467250
 
 


 








 

 

 
 Control of practice
 
 Date:
 17 December 2025
 
 
 

 


 

 

 

 

 Decision
 -
 Control of practice
 


 

 Outcome:
 Condition
 

 

 Outcome date:
 17 December 2025
 

 

 Published date:
 16 March 2026
 

 



 


 
Firm details


 

 Firm or organisation at time of matters giving rise to outcome

 

 

 Name:
 SZ Solicitors Ltd
 

 

 Address(es):
 502 Great West Road, Hounslow TW5 0TE
 

 

 Firm ID:
 467250
 


 


 

 
Outcome details

 
This outcome was reached by SRA decision.



 
Decision details



Raghwinder Siddhu's practising certificate for 2025/2026 is subject to the following conditions:

Mr Siddhu is not a manager or owner of any authorised body.

Subject to condition one above, Mr Siddhu may act as a solicitor only as an employee and only where that employment has first been approved by the SRA.

Mr Siddhu may not act as a compliance officer for legal practice (COLP) or a compliance officer for finance and administration (COFA) for any authorised body.

Mr Siddhu does not hold or receive client money, or act as a signatory to any client or office account or have the power to authorise transfers from any client or office account.


 
Reasons/basis



The above conditions are necessary in the public interest and reasonable and proportionate having regard to the purposes set out in Regulation 7 of the SRA Authorisation of Individuals Regulations and the regulatory objectives and principles governing regulatory activities as contained in section 28 of the Legal Services Act 2007.


 




 


 

 








 

 

 
 Closure
 
 Date:
 8 July 2025
 
 
 

 


 

 

 

 

 Decision
 -
 Closure
 


 

 Outcome:
 Intervention
 

 

 Outcome date:
 8 July 2025
 

 

 Published date:
 11 July 2025
 

 



 


 
Firm details


 

 Firm or organisation at date of publication
 

 

 Name:
 SZ Solicitors Limited
 

 

 Address(es):
 502 Great West Road, Hounslow TW5 0TE
 

 

 Firm ID:
 634695
 


 


 

 
Outcome details

 
This outcome was reached by SRA decision.



 
Decision details



To intervene into the practice of Raghwinder Singh Siddhu practising as SZ Solicitors Limited.

 
Reasons/basis



Mr Zafar and Mr Siddhu have failed to comply with the SRA Code of Conduct for Firms, the SRA Code of Conduct for Solicitors RELs and RFLs, the SRA Accounts Rules 2011 and the SRA Accounts Rules (2019) which are rules made under sections 31 and 32 of the Solicitors Act 1974 (as amended) (paragraph 1(1)(c) of Schedule 1 to the Act).

There is reason to suspect dishonesty on the part of Mr Zafar and of Mr Siddhu in connection with their practices at the firm (paragraph 1(1)(a)(i) of Schedule 1 to the Solicitors Act 1974 (as amended)).

 
Other information



His practicing certificate is suspended
 
Intervening agents

 

 Claire Burrows
 of
 Shakespeare Martineau,
 SHMA SRA Interventions, PO Box 18228, Birmingham, B2 2HX
 has been appointed as the intervening agent.
